body.title: Consequence check: per-project expert panel divergence
body.result: CLEAR — per-project panels in use; ADC/TheIgors divergence hasn't caused missed cross-repo findings; EXPERTS.md maintained without major burden
body.description:
**What changed:** /audit-expert now loads expert panels per-project from EXPERTS.md.
**Predicted unintended effects:** ADC and TheIgors panels may diverge so far that cross-repo findings are missed; EXPERTS.md maintenance burden falls on Akien without a clear update trigger; fallback to 11-expert list may mask missing EXPERTS.md.
**Signals to watch:** Are audit-expert runs in ADC and TheIgors producing meaningfully different findings? Is EXPERTS.md being kept current or left stale?
**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-06-03 — after at least 3 audit-expert runs per repo.

**Affected files:** None — observation only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe; annotate outcome as expected/unexpected/stale and close
**Test plan:** no tests — observation ticket
